---
title: "Selvin Carrillo"
image: peaches.jpg

about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round 
  image-width: 15em
  links:
     - text: Email 
       icon: envelope
       href: mailto:selvincar@hotmail.com
     - text: LinkedIn
       icon: linkedin
       href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/selvincarrillo/
     - text: GitHub
       icon: github
       href: https://github.com/selvincarrillo
     - text: Resume 
       icon: file-text
       href: CV_SCR.pdf
---

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.

```{r}
1 + 1
```
